_comment: AC1 (333.4) e2e fixture A — the CLI JSON as the GUI filter editor EXPORTS it for the sum-of-products (3-5) OR (entry:2 & exit:4) OR (3-5 & entry:2). This mirrors exactly what src/gui/file_io.cpp ExpandSopToClauses + SerializeFilterForCore emit: one simple filter per (clause,term) with NO dedup (note id 1 and id 3 are both raypath [3,5]), then a trailing complex whose composition is [[clause0-terms],[clause1-terms],[clause2-terms]] = [[1],[2],[3,4]]. Rendered against fixture B (composition_core_direct.json, the same predicate hand-authored/deduped) they must produce statistically identical halos — proving the GUI expansion is semantically equivalent to expressing the filter directly in core (AC1 'simulation applies the compound gate correctly'). Structural GUI->export fidelity is separately guarded by the GUI tests (p2_filter_type/multi_row_commits_sop, sop_roundtrip_via_gui_editor) and the unit test filter_expand_struct_vs_json.
